user.title: Log in to Tracksolid Pro
user.description: Enter your Tracksolid Pro account email and password. The App Key and App Secret are pre-filled with the platform defaults — only change them if login fails and you have obtained your own credentials from Tracksolid support.

data_description.region: Choose the region that matches your Tracksolid Pro account. If unsure, try Europe first.
data_description.app_key: Leave as-is unless the default does not work. Contact Tracksolid support to obtain your own.
data_description.app_secret: Leave as-is unless the default does not work.

devices.title: Select devices to track
devices.description: Choose which devices you want to track in Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your email, password, and region. If those are correct, the default App Key may not work for your account — try obtaining your own from Tracksolid Pro support.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Tracksolid Pro server. Check your region selection and internet connection.
error.no_devices: No devices found for this account.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
